summary.what_built: This module creates a health check endpoint for a Flask application.
summary.problem: It solves the problem of verifying database connectivity.
summary.risk: Medium risk due to limited error handling and lack of support for different database types.
summary.validation: The code has been checked for basic functionality and returns the expected JSON responses.
summary.on_apply: When the operator clicks Apply, the health check endpoint will be added to the application.
summary.uncertainty: It is uncertain how the endpoint will behave under different database configurations or in production environments.
